patches.find: both the predicted value (the sidereal day / K1 tidal period, ~23.934 h) and observed value (23.9345 h) are static constants with no live data fetch at runtime
patches.replace: both the predicted value (the sidereal day / K1 tidal period, ~23.934 h) and observed value (23.9345 h) appear to be static constants with no live data fetch at runtime (per the dashboard Source: IERS published label — no independent code audit of monitor.py has been performed to verify this implementation detail directly)
patches.rationale: ISS-1777: hedge the unverified source-code claim that values are hardcoded in monitor.py. The observable evidence (dashboard labels 'Source: IERS published' rather than a live API endpoint) already supports the argument. The direct monitor.py assertion was not verifiable against a specific artifact. This hedge preserves the post-hoc argument while accurately characterizing what we have and have not verified.
